description: Mockzilla MCP server. Mock any OpenAPI spec locally with Claude, Cursor, or Gemini CLI.
name: io.github.mockzilla/mockzilla-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Bearer token (mz_oauth_* or mz_*) that unlocks the hosted plane on mockzilla.org. Leave unset to use only the local plane.
environmentVariables.name: MOCKZILLA_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Override the hosted MCP endpoint (staging or self-hosted). Defaults to https://app.mockzilla.org/mcp/.
environmentVariables.name: MOCKZILLA_MCP_URL

environmentVariables.description: Preferred port for the local managed mock server. Defaults to 2200; falls back to a kernel-picked port if busy.
environmentVariables.name: MOCKZILLA_MANAGED_PORT
